canonical.gloss_en: hi, bye (abbrev. of السلام عليكم \ وعليكم السلام)
to speak, to talk, to address
to be ignorant, to not understand
to be empty, to be devoid, to be vacant
to ring, to produce a gentle modulating sound
to neglect to do, to fail to do, not to do
to cleave, to break up, to dig up
to come to a stop, to come to a standstill
to set free, to liberate, to release (e.g., from prison)
to throw down to the ground
to be lit, to be illuminated
to be or become ugly, misshapen
to produce water (of a well, etc.)
baobarang, false black pepper (Embelia ribes; also Embelia tsjeriam-cottam syn. Embelia robusta)
to be true, to be confirmed
the young of a deer or gazelle
to suffer indigestion, to be troubled with glut
to become a young adult, to grow up
to stream, to flow, to well
a half-breed from a male Bactrian camel and a female dromedary
to strip of flesh, to nibble
to murmur, to bubble, to gurgle
to dilute, to mix with water
to be master, to be lord
to flap the wings (of a bird)
to fashion a point or tip
to settle a dowry for (one's wife, etc.)
to string (as a bow), to provide with a string
to witness, to be a witness
to incline, to bend, to lean
to shy, to bolt, to stampede
grim, glowering, frowning, stern, scowling, surly
to cover, to veil, to shroud
to combat, to battle, to fight
to be unclean, to be impure
a chief of a group of soldiers
to tie a rope to a camel's nose
to suck the marrow from (a bone)
to forget, to think no more of
mindful one; one who remembers God

compound_with_canonical.gloss_en: to separate, to become distinct, to sunder

orphan_compound.gloss_en: of or relating to a burrow
